item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Tuesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
yes
i guess
for when you want to get extreme
it's a nice name
i like him
lava
wait what's wrong with Lois??
thank mr skeltal
kinda weird
is it though?
perfection
weird i don't remember those scenes at all
mmm hmm
nah that's a cookie
dang
if you don't have one, yes you do because uncle cel is your friend
that's all for me, have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: A Megadump of Music for the Halloween Season
item.description:
Evanescence - Haunted A handy dandy Spotify playlist for this collection - https://open.spotify.com/playlist/3g9DYF47kOg9h8lyoKrNKO
Thriller - Michael Jackson https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sOnqjkJTMaA
Ray Parker Jr - Ghostbusters
The Cramps - Goo Goo Muck https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AE2bY2gOBhk
Pet Semetary - The Ramones https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HJWFsZ_YUc4
Shakespeares Sisters - Stay
Blue Öyster Cult - (Don't) Fear the Reaper
allSTARS* - Things Go Bump in the Night
Nine Inch Nails - Dead Souls
Rob Zombie - Dragula https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EqQuihD0hoI
Shakira - She-Wolf
Concrete Blonde - Bloodletting (The Vampire Song)
Stevie Wonder - Superstition https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=97hwNY3ni10
Bobby "Boris" Pickett - Monster Mash https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vNuVifA7DSU
Siouxsie and the Banshees - Halloween
Oingo Boingo - Deadman's Party
The Rocky Horror Picture Show - Sweet Transvestite
Charlie Brown's The Great Pumpkin Waltz - Vince Guaraldi
Backstreet Boys - Everybody (Back Street's Back)
Alice Cooper - Feed My Frankenstein
Day O (The Banana Boat Song) - Harry Belafonte
Bing Crosby - The Headless Horseman
Metallica - Master of Puppets
I Put a Spell on You - Bette Midler, Sarah Jessica Parker, Kathy Najimy
Fresh Prince and DJ Jazzy Jeff - Nightmare on My Street
Red Right Hand - Nick Cave and the Bad Seeds
Love Song for a Vampire - Annie Lennox https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vhG8zC4npsE
It's Terror Time - Skycycle https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bajsQ4dDxD0
Ministry - Everday is Halloween
Type O Negative - Black No 1
Halloween - John Carpenter https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cc_FOPxrq8I
Scary Monsters and Super Creeps - David Bowie
The Man with the Hex - The Atomic Fireballs
The Who - Boris the Spider
Flatlinerz - Live Evil
Cry Little Sister - Gerard McMahon
Spooky Scary Skeletons
The Rolling Stones - Sympathy for the Devil
Weird Al Yankovic - Slime Creatures from Outer Space
Halloween - HELLOWEEN
Creedence Clearwater Revival - Bad Moon Rising
Welcome to My Nightmare - Alice Cooper https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iz0lXNNkqac
Weird Science - Oingo Boingo https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Gcobs4LJdZM
Ozzy Osbourne - Bark at the Moon https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LplPi2CxNHI
Cliff Richard - Devil Woman
The Rocky Horror Picture Show - Time Warp
Whodini - Freaks Come Out at Night
Michael Jackson - Is It Scary?
The Sisters of Mercy - Lucretia My Reflection https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pxwCIlwSdvg
Dead Kennedys - Halloween https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3GNWSaO0Utw
Iron Maiden - Dance of Death
This is Halloween
Blue Öyster Cult - GODZILLA
Anything Can Happen on Halloween - Tim Curry
The Purple People Eater Song - Sheb Wooley
Toccata and Fugue (in D minor) - Johann Sebastian Bach https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bG-Ml_EN-wU
Grim Grinning Ghosts
Voltaire - BRAINS!
45 Grave - Party Time
Vincent Price's The Monster Mash Full song - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ffKXiGcmsxU
A Night on Bald Mountain - Mussorgsky
Werewolves of London - Warren Zevon https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qae25976UgA
Nosferatu - Blue Oyster Cult
Mike Oldfield - Tubular Bells https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KXatvzWAzLU
Goblin - Suspiria
Jace Everett - Bad Things
Fright Night - J. Geils Band
In the Hall of the Mountain King - Edvard Grieg https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4nMUr8Rt2AI
Dia de los Muertos - Voltaire https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YfqnulWWxbM (Spanish version - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3w3kcZB7Ups )
Boris Karloff and Bing Crosby - The Halloween Song
Norma Tanega - You're Dead
He's Back (The Man Behind the Mask) - Alice Cooper https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=K-XAjEyrqOs
Double Trouble - John Williams
Duran Duran - Hungry Like the Wolf
Ghost Riders in the Sky
Nocturnal Me - Echo and the Bunnymen
Season of the Witch - Donovan
I Want to be Evil - Eartha Kitt https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SS02GeKuWQ4
Somebody's Watching Me - Rockwell
Gordon Lightfoot - Sundown
Toto Coelo - Dracula's Tango (Sucker for Your Love) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ROtqnIOHMJs
Type O Negative - Wolf Moon
Skull - The Misfits
Stop (I'm Already Dead) - Deadboy & the Elephantmen
The Cramps - I Was a Teenage Werewolf
Yeah Yeah Yeah - Heads Will Roll
Bauhaus - Bela Lugosi's Dead
Blue Öyster Cult - Harvest Moon
45 Grave - Riboflavin Flavored Non-Carbonated Polyunsaturated Blood
Hall and Oates - Maneater
Siouxsie and the Banshees - Trust in Me
Killer Klowns from Outer Space - The Dickies
The Chandalier rises for the final time
Golden Earring - Twilight Zone
Samhain - George Streicher
Outkast - Dracula's Wedding
(The Tempus Quartet and Isabelle Govea): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XAyaDcLxwHQ
The Cramps - Creature from the Black Leather Lagoon
Sheena Easton - Telefone
Megan Thee Stallion - Scary
Werewolf Bar Mitzvah
Van Halen - Running with the Devil
The Fat Boys - Are You Ready for FREDDY?!
Vampire Twist
Vincent Price's monologue from THRILLER
item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: Memes vol 258 faves
item.description:
Here’s another installment of my favorite memes
I made this one and it’s the greatest thing I’ve ever created. I made is after I realized my music library just consisted of all 4
PLEASE CAN THEY DO THIS!!!! And to answer the questions I always get with AO3- it stands for archive of our own, a fanfiction site that has everything- seriously look up your favorite characters- they will be having sex on AO3
*weeping*
This might be my favorite image not taken by me of all time. If someone could find sauce- no maybe I don’t want to know
Newsies! What about Newsies!! But Cabaret slaps and all the others actually but I’ve never seen my fair lady actually
Nessie is quite loud
*sobbing*
STOP LOOK AT HIS LITTLE FACE NOOOOO TAKE THEM YOU HEATHEN
RAAAAAGHHHHH MIKE FAIST GUYS I DONT MEAN TO GATEKEEP OR ANYTHING BUT HIS FIRST EVER PROFESSIONAL ACTING GIG WAS NEWSIES ON BROADWAY WHERE HE UNDERSTUDIED JEREMY FRICKIN JORDAN AND HE THINKS HE CANT SING- imagine being able to sing so well that you understudy JEREMY JORDAN in NEWSIES singing SANTA FE and you have the AUDACITY to think you can’t sing- SIR PLEASE sorry I’m capitalizing like Greg Heffley but I’m very passionate about Mike Faist- I think he’s so hot but my boyfriend and everyone I’ve ever shown (the both of them together) thinks he looks like my dad- so you win this round Freud I guess :( ALSO HE LOVES TAP DANCING!! And he was so good in West Side Story https://youtu.be/9MaDKTexdgk?si=ZQS8cGTnKy19L4Ca LISTEN YOU GUYS
Whenever my boyfriend plays Marvin Gaye, I say “Marvin Gaye’s clueless ass” and it brings me endless entertainment
NEWSIES IS SO HIGH UP!! It’s 3!
My friend had a cat named Missy, short for Missile Launcher
Corey Cott! And Ben Fankhauser!!
Liza Jane tax
Froggy tax
Nessie tax
Scruffy tax

item.title: Cool that the largest animal to ever live on the earth is part of our timeline
item.dc:creator: LosPer

item.title: I know it's late and Imgur will be flooded by the debate but I wanted to share my October 1st witchy outfit I wore to work.
item.description: I'm obsessed with this purse and will wear it everyday this month. I was the only one at work dressed up to usher in October. It was an awesome even if exhausting work day on my feet. But witches know how to get shit done. Hope you all can excuse my obvious selfies but I was feeling really happy today and in love with my thrown together outfit. Have a wonderful October, everyone!
item.dc:creator: princesscindycat

item.title: I did a thing...and it's OUT!
item.description: SO PROUD of the entire team ... the new Barbarella series has been in the works for years, and issue 1 is finally out TODAY! Imgur is such an awesome community, and has been so supportive through all my ups and downs over the years ... Just wanted to share an 'up' day, and let everyone know how much you mean to me. xox Sending all the love from Canada!
item.dc:creator: BlakeNorthcott

item.title: Mola mola, aka ocean sunfish
item.dc:creator: pilomotor

item.title: My dream of 20 years is coming true - my love letter to Chrono Trigger and FF called Threads of Time was just unveiled at Tokyo Game Show!
item.description:
[Edit]: Thank you all for the lovely feedback and encouragement! For people asking about wishlisting, we’re now up on Steam! https://store.steampowered.com/app/2090210/Threads_of_Time/ Hey all! We're back! In high school my best friend and I made a promise to each other that we would one day make a love letter to JRPGs like Chrono Trigger and Final Fantasy... and it's finally coming true! That was over 20 years ago - since then, we've got a lot more experience, gathered an indie team, and are pouring our hearts into it! It would be amazing to have others make even a fraction of the treasured gaming memories we made growing up in the 90s.
Prehistory - 12,000,000 BC
Future
2400 AD
Apocalypse
Middle Ages Would love to hear what you think, and are more than happy to answer any questions that come up!
item.dc:creator: riyogamesdev

item.title: A day in the life of a bottom shelf 744 hour Extra-Life charity stream. Day 2.
item.description:
I lied. I'm back because @CrimeBrulee insisted I continue pestering you guys about our charity drive. So here.
Something, something, Spongebob.
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
BSV does 30 day continuous stream on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka to help raise money for Extra-Life. We have 29 days, 6 hours, 7 minutes, and 24 seconds remaining until we end the stream. Https://Extra-Life.org/participant/bottomshelfvodka
Join for the games. Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Deaf Cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Studio Ghibli has the emotional power to be utterly adorable but also heartbreaking.
item.description:
1
2
3
4
5
6
7 If you brighten the poster of the Studio Ghibli animation "Grave Of The Fireflies"(1988), you will notice that some of the lights are not fireflies but incendiary bombs from a B-29 bomber
8
